content.json:
# CCL Pipeline

Auto-fill → Pressure test → Approve → ND upload. Filter by matter id or practice area in the parameters below.

parameters.name: MatterId
parameters.description: Optional — leave blank for all matters

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name in ('CCL.AutoFill.Started','CCL.AutoFill.Completed','CCL.AutoFill.Failed','CCL.PressureTest.Started','CCL.PressureTest.Completed','CCL.PressureTest.Failed','CCL.Approve.Completed','CCL.NdUpload.Completed')
| summarize Count = count() by bin(timestamp, 1h), name
| render timechart
content.title: Pipeline phases over time

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name startswith 'CCL.' and name endswith '.Failed'
| extend error = tostring(customDimensions.error)
| summarize Count = count(), Samples = make_list(error, 5) by name
| order by Count desc
content.title: Failure hotspots
Latency between phases

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name startswith 'CCL.'
| extend matterId = tostring(customDimensions.matterId)
| where isempty('{MatterId}') or matterId == '{MatterId}'
| project timestamp, name, matterId, customDimensions
| order by timestamp desc
| take 200
content.title: Recent CCL events (filter by matter)
